_comment_: User-editable dashboard preferences. Edit via the Settings sheet (sidebar gear icon → 'Behavior') or by writing here directly + restarting dashboard-server. NOTE: localStorage 'careerOps.settings' shadows these at runtime per-browser; the file is the durable baseline + cross-device fallback.

outreach._help_: intensity ∈ {gentle, normal, aggressive}. gentle = only HIGH-confidence prompts (warm connections, overdue >14d). normal = today's default. aggressive = surface every actionable nudge including lukewarm leads. suppression = list of {name, reason} or LinkedIn profile-id strings; the outreach tracker skips these from due/breakup lists.
